name: Entroly Context Engine
description: Provider-independent context engineering for every OpenClaw model route, with protected blocks, recovery delegation, and local audit receipts.

pythonCommand.label: Python Command
pythonCommand.help: Python executable where the entroly package is installed.

preserveLastN.label: Recent Messages Preserved
preserveLastN.help: Number of recent messages kept byte-for-byte unchanged.

timeoutMs.label: Bridge Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Maximum time for one Entroly context assembly request.

fallbackTokenBudget.label: Fallback Prompt Token Budget
fallbackTokenBudget.help: Operator-approved budget used when OpenClaw cannot provide one. It takes precedence over automatic registry discovery.

autoDiscoverContextBudget.label: Auto-discover Context Budget
autoDiscoverContextBudget.help: When OpenClaw omits a budget, resolve a conservative input ceiling from verified, user-supplied, or explicitly discovered model metadata. No remote discovery is enabled automatically.

receiptDir.label: Receipt Directory
receiptDir.help: Optional local directory for Entroly OpenClaw receipts.

receiptMaxFiles.label: Receipt File Limit
receiptMaxFiles.help: Fail safely instead of writing when this append-only receipt count is reached.

receiptMaxBytes.label: Receipt Byte Limit
receiptMaxBytes.help: Fail safely instead of allowing the receipt directory to exceed this byte quota.

writeReceipts.label: Write Local Receipts
writeReceipts.help: Record context hashes, estimated savings, warnings, and decision metadata locally.

distill.label: Distill Older Assistant Messages
distill.help: Remove filler from compressible older assistant responses before budget compression.

evidencePinning.label: Query-Aware Evidence Pinning
evidencePinning.help: Keep older messages that match the current request verbatim when they fit the bounded evidence reserve.

proofGuidedRecovery.label: Proof-Guided Recovery
proofGuidedRecovery.help: Opt in to local output verification and at most the configured number of OpenClaw revision passes using exact recovered evidence. Requires hooks.allowConversationAccess=true because it inspects model input and output.

proofGuidedMaxRounds.label: Maximum Proof Rounds
proofGuidedMaxRounds.help: Hard cap on model attempts, including the first response. Additional paid calls occur only when Proof-Guided Recovery is explicitly enabled.

proofGuidedRecoveryTokens.label: Recovery Token Budget
proofGuidedRecoveryTokens.help: Maximum estimated exact-evidence tokens recovered for one revision decision.

proofGuidedMaxMessages.label: Recovery Message Limit
proofGuidedMaxMessages.help: Maximum exact omitted messages appended to one revision instruction.
